com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignLogcatBinding\\\\\\\\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.ui.ToastDuration\\\\\\\\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.*\\\\\\\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\\\\\\\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\\\\\\\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass LogcatDesign(\\\\\\\\n    context: Context,\\\\\\\\n    private val streaming: Boolean,\\\\\\\\n) : Design\u003cLogcatDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\\\\\\\\n    sealed class Request {\\\\\\\\n        object Close : Request()\\\\\\\\n        object Delete : Request()\\\\\\\\n        object Export : Request()\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private val binding = DesignLogcatBinding\\\\\\\\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    /** When true, display order is reversed (oldest-first when streaming; newest-first when file). */\\\\\\\\n    private var reversedOrder = false\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private val adapter = LogMessageAdapter(context) {\\\\\\\\n        launch {\\\\\\\\n            val data = ClipData.newPlainText(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"log_message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", it.message)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            context.getSystemService\u003cClipboardManager\u003e()?.setPrimaryClip(data)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            showToast(R.string.copied, ToastDuration.Short)\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    suspend fun patchMessages(messages: List\u003cLogMessage\u003e, removed: Int, appended: Int) {\\\\\\\\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\\\\\\\\n            adapter.messages = messages\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            adapter.notifyItemRangeInserted(adapter.messages.size, appended)\\\\\\\\n            adapter.notifyItemRangeRemoved(0, removed)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if (streaming \u0026\u0026 binding.recyclerList.isTop) {\\\\\\\\n                binding.recyclerList.scrollToPosition(messages.size - 1)\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    override val root: View\\\\\\\\n        get() = binding.root\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    init {\\\\\\\\n        binding.self = this\\\\\\\\n        binding.streaming = com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.getPixels\\\\\\\\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\\\\\\\\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedResourceId\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass ProxyViewConfig(val context: Context, var proxyLine: Int) {\\\\\\\\n    private val colorSurface = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorSurface)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    val clickableBackground =\\\\\\\\n        context.resolveThemedResourceId(android.R.attr.selectableItemBackground)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    val selectedControl = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnPrimary)\\\\\\\\n    val selectedBackground = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    val unselectedControl = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnSurface)\\\\\\\\n    val delayTimeoutColor = Color.RED\\\\\\\\n    val unselectedBackground: Int\\\\\\\\n        get() = if (proxyLine==1) Color.TRANSPARENT else colorSurface\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    val layoutPadding = context.getPixels(R.dimen.proxy_layout_padding).toFloat()\\\\\\\\n    val contentPadding\\\\\\\\n        get() = if (proxyLine==2) context.getPixels(R.dimen.proxy_content_padding).toFloat() else context.getPixels(R.dimen.proxy_content_padding_grid3).toFloat()\\\\\\\\n    val textMargin\\\\\\\\n IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (u *URLTest) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn u.fast(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (u *URLTest) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tall := []string{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range u.GetProxies(false) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":           u.Type().String(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"now\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":            u.Now(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"all\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":            all,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"testUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":        u.testUrl,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"expectedStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": u.expectedStatus,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fixed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":          u.selected,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"hidden\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":         u.Hidden,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"icon\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":           u.Icon,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t})\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (u *URLTest) Providers() []P.ProxyProvider {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn u.providers\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (u *URLTest) Proxies() []C.Proxy {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn u.GetProxies(false)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (u *URLTest) expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc parseURLTestOption(config map[string]any) []urlTestOption {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\topts := []urlTestOption{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// tolerance\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif elm, ok := config[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tolerance\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]; ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif tolerance, ok := elm.(int); ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\topts = append(opts, urlTestWithTolerance(uint16(tolerance)))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn opts\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc NewURLTest(option (\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"errors\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fmt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"strings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/atomic\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tC []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype GroupBaseOption struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tName                  string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tType                  C.AdapterType\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tFilter {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar excludeTypeArray []string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif opt.ExcludeType != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texcludeTypeArray = strings.Split(opt.ExcludeType, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar excludeFilterRegs []*regexp2.Regexp\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif opt.ExcludeFilter != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, excludeFilter := range strings.Split(opt.ExcludeFilter, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texcludeFilterReg := regexp2.MustCompile(excludeFilter, regexp2.None)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texcludeFilterRegs = append(excludeFilterRegs, excludeFilterReg)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar filterRegs []*regexp2.Regexp\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif opt.Filter != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, filter := range strings.Split(opt.Filter, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilterReg := regexp2.MustCompile(filter, regexp2.None)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilterRegs = append(filterRegs, filterReg)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb := \u0026GroupBase{\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tBase:              outbound.NewBase(outbound.BaseOption{Name: opt.Name, Type: opt.Type}),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilterRegs:        filterRegs,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texcludeFilterRegs: excludeFilterRegs,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texcludeTypeArray:  excludeTypeArray,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproviders:         opt.Providers,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfailedTesting:     atomic.NewBool(false),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tTestTimeout:          opt.TestTimeout,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfailureResetInterval: opt.FailureResetInterval,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tmaxFailedTimes:        opt.MaxFailedTimes,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.TestTimeout == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.TestTimeout = 5000\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.failureResetInterval == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failureResetInterval = 5000\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.maxFailedTimes == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.maxFailedTimes = 5\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn gb\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) Touch() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, pd := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tpd.Touch()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) GetProxies(touch bool) []C.Proxy {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproviderVersions := make([]uint32, len(gb.providers))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor i, pd := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif touch { // touch first\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tpd.Touch()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproviderVersions[i] = pd.Version()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// thread safe\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.getProxiesMutex.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tdefer gb.getProxiesMutex.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// return the cached proxies if version not changed\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif slices.Equal(providerVersions, gb.providerVersions) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn gb.providerProxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar proxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(gb.filterRegs) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, pd := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = append(proxies, pd.Proxies()...)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, pd := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif pd.VehicleType() == P.Compatible { // compatible provider unneeded filter\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = append(proxies, pd.Proxies()...)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet := map[string]struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, filterReg := range gb.filterRegs {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range pd.Proxies() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tname := p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif mat, _ := filterReg.MatchString(name); mat {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := proxiesSet[name]; !ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet[name] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = append(proxies, newProxies...)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// Multiple filers means that proxies are sorted in the order in which the filers appear.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// Although the filter has been performed once in the previous process,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// when there are multiple providers, the array needs to be reordered as a whole.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(gb.providers) \u003e 1 \u0026\u0026 len(gb.filterRegs) \u003e 1 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet := map[string]struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, filterReg := range gb.filterRegs {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tname := p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif mat, _ := filterReg.MatchString(name); mat {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := proxiesSet[name]; !ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet[name] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range proxies { // add not matched proxies at the end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tname := p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := proxiesSet[name]; !ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet[name] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = newProxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(gb.excludeFilterRegs) \u003e 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tLOOP1:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tname := p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, excludeFilterReg := range gb.excludeFilterRegs {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif mat, _ := excludeFilterReg.MatchString(name); mat {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue LOOP1\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = newProxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.excludeTypeArray != nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tLOOP2:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tmType := p.Type().String()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, excludeType := range gb.excludeTypeArray {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif strings.EqualFold(mType, excludeType) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue LOOP2\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = newProxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(proxies) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn []C.Proxy{tunnel.Proxies()[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"COMPATIBLE\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// only cache when proxies not empty\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.providerVersions = providerVersions\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.providerProxies = proxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn proxies\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) URLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (map[string]uint16, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar lock sync.Mutex\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tmp := map[string]uint16{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproxies := gb.GetProxies(false)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxy := proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Add(1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgo func() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdelay, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif err == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlock.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tmp[proxy.Name()] = delay\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlock.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Done()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg.Wait()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(mp) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn mp, fmt.Errorf(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"get delay: all proxies timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn mp, nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) onDialFailed(adapterType C.AdapterType, err error, fn func()) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif adapterType == C.Direct || adapterType == C.Compatible || adapterType == C.Reject || adapterType == C.Pass || adapterType == C.RejectDrop {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif errors.Is(err, C.ErrNotSupport) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgo func() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif strings.Contains(err.Error(), \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"connection refused\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfn()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTestMux.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdefer gb.failedTestMux.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTimes++\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif gb.failedTimes == 1 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ProxyGroup: %s first failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", gb.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTime = time.Now()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif time.Since(gb.failedTime) \u003e time.Duration(gb.failureResetInterval)*time.Millisecond {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTimes = 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ProxyGroup: %s failed count: %d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", gb.Name(), gb.failedTimes)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif gb.failedTimes \u003e= gb.maxFailedTimes {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Warnln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"because %s failed multiple times, active health check\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", gb.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfn()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) healthCheck() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.failedTesting.Load() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// Notify health check triggered for fallback groups (CFA only)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif gb.Type() == C.Fallback {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fallback group %s triggered health check\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", gb.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnotifyHealthCheckTriggered(gb.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTesting.Store(true)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg := sync.WaitGroup{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxyProvider := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Add(1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxyProvider := proxyProvider\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgo func() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdefer wg.Done()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxyProvider.HealthCheck()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg.Wait()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTesting.Store(false)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTimes = 0\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) onDialSuccess() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif !gb.failedTesting.Load() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgb.failedTimes = tunnel\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport (\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc HealthCheck(name string) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif p == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Warnln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: not found\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", name)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif !ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Warnln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", name, p.Type().String())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Add(1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tprovider.HealthCheck()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Done()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}(pr)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg.Wait()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc HealthCheckAll() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgo func(group string) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tHealthCheck(group)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}(g)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback).\\\\\\\\n// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" until user selects again.\\\\\\\\nfunc ClearAllManualSelections() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif p == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":69}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"9d6e7fbb-5799-4b0b-a235-ce9aea82ff97\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"4088f5ca-6ecc-4335-8685-b302dc2c8672\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-01T01:43:54.054Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescrip provider\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport (\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"strings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/atomic\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/singledo\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tC \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype HealthCheckOption struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tURL      string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tInterval uint\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype extraOption struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfilters        map[string]struct{}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype HealthCheck struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tctx            context.Context\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tctxCancel      context.CancelFunc\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl            string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\textra          map[string]*extraOption\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tmu             sync.Mutex\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproxies        []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tinterval       time.Duration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tlazy           bool\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tlastTouch      atomic.TypedValue[time.Time]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tsingleDo       *singledo.Single[struct{}]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ttimeout        time.Duration\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) process() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tticker := time.NewTicker(hc.interval)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgo hc.check()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tselect {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcase \u003c-ticker.C:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlastTouch := hc.lastTouch.Load()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tsince := time.Since(lastTouch)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif !hc.lazy || since \u003c hc.interval {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.check()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Skip once health check because we are lazy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcase \u003c-hc.ctx.Done():\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tticker.Stop()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) setProxies(proxies []C.Proxy) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.proxies = proxies\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) registerHealthCheckTask(url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16], filter string, interval uint) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl = strings.TrimSpace(url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(url) == 0 || url == hc.url {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ignore invalid health check url: %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.mu.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tdefer hc.mu.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// if the provider has not set up health checks, then modify it to be the same as the group's interval\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif hc.interval == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.interval = time.Duration(interval) * time.Second\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif hc.extra == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.extra = make(map[string]*extraOption)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// prioritize the use of previously registered configurations, especially those from provider\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := hc.extra[url]; ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// provider default health check does not set filter\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif url != hc.url \u0026\u0026 len(filter) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tsplitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter, hc.extra[url])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"health check url: %s exists\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\toption := \u0026extraOption{filters: map[string]struct{}{}, expectedStatus: expectedStatus}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tsplitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.extra[url] = option\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc splitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter string, option *extraOption) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfilter = strings.TrimSpace(filter)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(filter) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, regex := range strings.Split(filter, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tregex = strings.TrimSpace(regex)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(regex) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\toption.filters[regex] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) auto() bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn hc.interval != 0\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) touch() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.lastTouch.Store(time.Now())\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) check() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(hc.proxies) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t_, _, _ = hc.singleDo.Do(func() (struct{}, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tid := utils.NewUUIDV4().String()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Start New Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb := new(errgroup.Group)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb.SetLimit(30)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// execute default health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\toption := \u0026extraOption{filters: nil, expectedStatus: hc.expectedStatus}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.execute(b, hc.url, id, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// execute extra health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(hc.extra) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor url, option := range hc.extra {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.execute(b, url, id, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t_ = b.Wait()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Finish A Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn struct{}{}, nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t})\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) execute(b *errgroup.Group, url, uid string, option *extraOption) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl = strings.TrimSpace(url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(url) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Check has been skipped due to testUrl is empty, {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar filterReg *regexp2.Regexp\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif option != nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus = option.expectedStatus\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(option.filters) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilters := make([]string, 0, len(option.filters))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor filter := range option.filters {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilters = append(filters, filter)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilterReg = regexp2.MustCompile(strings.Join(filters, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), regexp2.None)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range hc.proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// skip proxies that do not require health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif filterReg != nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif match, _ := filterReg.MatchString(proxy.Name()); !match {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tp := proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb.Go(func() error {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(hc.ctx, hc.timeout)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdefer cancel()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Checking, proxy: %s, url: %s, id: {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", p.Name(), url, uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Checked, proxy: %s, url: %s, alive: %t, delay: %d ms uid: {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", p.Name(), url, p.AliveForTestUrl(url), p.LastDelayForTestUrl(url), uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t})\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) close() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.ctxCancel()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc NewHealthCheck(proxies []C.Proxy, url string, timeout uint, interval uint, lazy bool, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) *HealthCheck {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif url == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus = nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tinterval = 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif timeout == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ttimeout = 5000\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn \u0026HealthCheck{\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tctx:            ctx,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tctxCancel:      cancel,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies:        proxies,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\turl:            url,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ttimeout:        time.Duration(timeout) * time.Millisecond,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\textra:          map[string]*extraOption{},\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tinterval:       time.Duration(interval) * time.Second,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlazy:           lazy,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus: expectedStatus,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tsingleDo: node delay test; 0 = skip\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tHidden           bool\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tIcon             string\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tc, err := s.selectedProxy(true).DialContext(ctx, metadata)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif err == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tc.AppendToChains(s)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn c, err\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) s.selectedProxy(false).SupportUDP()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tall := []string{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// When testurl is the default value\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar url string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\turl = s.testUrl\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":    s.Type().String(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"now\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":     s.Now(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"all\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":     all,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"testUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": url,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"hidden\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": s.selectedProxy(false).Name()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) Set(name string) error {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar selectedProxy C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif proxy.Name() == name {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tselectedProxy = proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ts.selected = name\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ts.manualSelected = true\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tbreak\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif selectedProxy == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn errors.New(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxy not exist\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// 手动选择的节点用 selected-timeout 单独测速一次，便于界面显示真实延迟\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif s.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s.testUrl != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdefer cancel()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn nil\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) ForceSet(name string) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ts.selected = name\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ts.manualSelected = true\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) NowIsManual() bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn s.manualSelected\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ClearManualSelection resets selection to the first proxy so no node is \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"manually selected\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) ClearManualSelection() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproxies := s.GetProxies(false)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(proxies) \u003e 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ts.selected = proxies[0].Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ts.manualSelected = false\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn s.selectedProxy(touch)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) selectedProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproxies := s.GetProxies(touch)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif proxy.Name() == s.selected {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn proxies[0]\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (s *Selector) Providers() ptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n## 测速功能相关代码分析报告\\\\n\\\\n### 1. 测速功能实现代码\\\\n\\\\n#### 核心实现位置：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;** (第166-278行)\\\\n  - &#96;URLTest&#96; 方法：通过 HTTP HEAD 请求测速\\\\n  - 使用代理的 &#96;DialContext&#96; 建立连接\\\\n  - 默认测试 URL：&#96;https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204&#96;\\\\n  - 支持 &#96;unifiedDelay&#96; 模式（两次请求取第二次）\\\\n\\\\n#### 测速流程：\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;166:278:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go\\\\n// URLTest get the delay for the specified URL\\\\n// implements C.Proxy\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) URLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (t uint16, err error) {\\\\n\\\\t// 1. 通过代理建立连接\\\\n\\\\tinstance, err := p.DialContext(ctx, \u0026addr)\\\\n\\\\t// 2. 创建HTTP HEAD请求\\\\n\\\\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodHead, url, nil)\\\\n\\\\t// 3. 使用代理连接发送请求\\\\n\\\\tresp, err := client.Do(req)\\\\n\\\\t// 4. 计算延迟并记录\\\\n\\\\tt = uint16(time.Since(start) / time.Millisecond)\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 代理组测速实现：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/groupbase.go&#96;** (第223-249行)\\\\n  - &#96;GroupBase.URLTest&#96;：并发测试组内所有代理\\\\n  - 如果所有代理超时，返回错误：&#96;\\\\\\\"get delay: all proxies timeout\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/urltest.go&#96;**\\\\n  - URLTest 组：选择延迟最低且存活的节点\\\\n  - &#96;fast()&#96; 方法：按延迟选择最快节点\\\\n\\\\n### 2. 全局模式(Global Mode)相关代码\\\\n\\\\n#### 全局模式处理：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/config/config.go&#96;** (第948-956行)\\\\n  - 如果配置中没有 GLOBAL 组，自动创建 Selector 类型的 GLOBAL 组\\\\n  - GLOBAL 组包含所有代理（通过 CompatibleProvider）\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/main/golang/native/tunnel/proxies.go&#96;** (第56-79行)\\\\n  - &#96;QueryProxyGroupNames&#96;：全局模式下会添加 \\\\\\\"GLOBAL\\\\\\\" 到结果列表\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;go\\\\n  if mode == tunnel.Global {\\\\n      result = append(result, \\\\\\\"GLOBAL\\\\\\\")\\\\n  }\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/tunnel/tunnel.go&#96;** (第384-385行)\\\\n  - 全局模式下直接使用 &#96;proxies[\\\\\\\"GLOBAL\\\\\\\"]&#96; 作为代理\\\\n\\\\n#### 全局模式下的测速：\\\\n- GLOBAL 组是 Selector 类型，默认选择第一个代理\\\\n- 测速时会对 GLOBAL 组内的所有代理进行健康检查\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/main/golang/native/tunnel/connectivity.go&#96;** (第12-46行)\\\\n  - &#96;HealthCheck&#96; 会清空手动选择状态（第28-31行）\\\\n\\\\n### 3. 代理组测速相关代码\\\\n\\\\n#### URLTest 组：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/urltest.go&#96;**\\\\n  - &#96;fast()&#96; 方法（第109-155行）：选择延迟最低的存活节点\\\\n  - 支持 &#96;tolerance&#96; 参数，避免频繁切换\\\\n\\\\n#### Fallback 组：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go&#96;**\\\\n  - &#96;findAliveProxy()&#96; 方法（第106-152行）\\\\n  - 按顺序查找第一个存活的代理\\\\n  - 如果所有代理都失败，选择延迟最低的\\\\n\\\\n#### Selector 组：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/selector.go&#96;**\\\\n  - 手动选择节点时，如果设置了 &#96;selectedTimeout&#96;，会单独测速一次（第99-105行）\\\\n\\\\n### 4. 测速时使用的网络连接方式\\\\n\\\\n#### 连接方式：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;** (第210-231行)\\\\n  - 使用代理的 &#96;DialContext&#96; 建立 TCP 连接\\\\n  - 通过该连接发送 HTTP HEAD 请求\\\\n  - 使用自定义 &#96;http.Transport&#96;，将代理连接作为底层连接\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;229:239:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go\\\\ntransport := \u0026http.Transport{\\\\n\\\\tDialContext: func(context.Context, string, string) (net.Conn, error) {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn instance, nil\\\\n\\\\t},\\\\n\\\\t// from http.DefaultTransport\\\\n\\\\tMaxIdleConns:          100,\\\\n\\\\tIdleConnTimeout:       90 * time.Second,\\\\n\\\\tTLSHandshakeTimeout:   10 * time.Second,\\\\n\\\\tExpectContinueTimeout: 1 * time.Second,\\\\n\\\\tTLSClientConfig:       tlsConfig,\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 5. 可能导致测速失败的逻辑\\\\n\\\\n#### 失败场景：\\\\n\\\\n1. 所有代理超时\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/groupbase.go&#96;** (第244-245行)\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;go\\\\n   if len(mp) == 0 {\\\\n       return mp, fmt.Errorf(\\\\\\\"get delay: all proxies timeout\\\\\\\")\\\\n   }\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. 代理连接失败\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;** (第210-212行)\\\\n   - &#96;DialContext&#96; 失败会导致测速失败\\\\n\\\\n3. HTTP 请求失败\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;** (第251-254行)\\\\n   - &#96;client.Do(req)&#96; 失败会返回错误\\\\n\\\\n4. 状态码不匹配\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;** (第276行)\\\\n   - 如果设置了 &#96;expectedStatus&#96; 且响应状态码不匹配，&#96;satisfied&#96; 为 false\\\\n\\\\n5. 全局模式下的特殊问题\\\\n   - GLOBAL 组是 Selector 类型，默认选择第一个代理\\\\n   - 如果第一个代理不可用，可能影响测速结果\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/selector.go&#96;** (第134-142行)\\\\n   - &#96;selectedProxy&#96; 方法：如果选中的代理不存在，返回第一个代理\\\\n\\\\n6. 并发限制\\\\n   - **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go&#96;** (第132行)\\\\n   - 健康检查并发限制为 30：&#96;b.SetLimit(30)&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 6. 关键代码位置总结\\\\n\\\\n| 功能 | 文件路径 | 关键行数 |\\\\n|------|---------|---------|\\\\n| 测速核心实现 | &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96; | 166-278 |\\\\n| 代理组测速 | &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/groupbase.go&#96; | 223-249 |\\\\n| URLTest组 | &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/urltest.go&#96; | 全部 |\\\\n| 全局模式处理 | &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/config/config.go&#96; | 948-956 |\\\\n| 全局模式查询 | &#96;core/src/main/golang/native/tunnel/proxies.go&#96; | 56-79 |\\\\n| 健康检查入口 | &#96;core/src/main/golang/native/tunnel/connectivity.go&#96; | 12-46 |\\\\n| 健康检查实现 | &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go&#96; | 全部 |\\\\n| UI测速触发 | &#96;design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/ProxyDesign.kt&#96; | 159-165 |\\\\n\\\\n### 7. 重要发现\\\\n\\\\n1. 全局模式下，GLOBAL 组是 Selector 类型，默认选择第一个代理\\\\n2. 测速使用代理连接，如果代理本身有问题会导致测速失败\\\\n3. 测速会清空手动选择状态（&#96;ClearManualSelection&#96;）\\\\n4. 支持 &#96;unifiedDelay&#96; 模式，会发送两次请求以提高准确性\\\\n5. HTTP 测试 URL 可能被代理提供商劫持，建议使用 HTTPS\\\\n\\\\n以上为 ClashMetaForAndroid 项目中与测速相关的代码分析。\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1769856371085,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"搜索Android测速相关代码\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"agent\",\"forceMode\":\"edit\",\"usageData\":{},\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-1\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDismissed\":false,\"totalLinesAdded\":0,\"totalLinesRemoved\":0,\"addedFiles\":0,\"removedFiles\":0,\"isDraft\":false,\"isCreatingWorktree\":false,\"isApplyingWorktree\":false,\"isUndoingWorktree\":false,\"applied\":false,\"pendingCreateWorktree\":false,\"isBestOfNSubcomposer\":false,\"isBestOfNParent\":false,\"bestO <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
现在我理解了问题的核心。让我查看Android端VPN模式下测速请求的网络路由情况。在全局模式下，VPN会拦截所有流量，包括测速请求本身，这可能导致循环依赖的问题。</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
现在我找到了关键代码！`dialer.DefaultSocketHook` 在每个网络连接建立时调用 `app.MarkSocket(int(fd))`，这个函数通过Android VpnService的`protect`方法保护socket，使其不被VPN拦截。

这意味着测速连接应该会被保护，不会被VPN拦截。让我继续查看是否有什么特殊情况导致全局模式下测速失败。

让我查看测速时的DialContext调用链，确保测速连接确实使用了被保护的socket。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
现在我理解了代码的架构。当应用在Android上运行时，所有通过`dialer.DialContext`创建的网络连接都会调用`DefaultSocketHook`，这个hook会调用`app.MarkSocket(int(fd))`来保护socket，使其不被VPN拦截。

这意味着测速连接理论上应该是被保护的。但是，让我检查一下测速时是否真的通过了这个DialContext流程。让我再看看测速时的连接流程。

从adapter.go中的URLTest函数来看：
```go
instance, err := p.DialContext(ctx, &addr)
```

这里调用的是代理的DialContext，比如对于VMESS代理，它会调用outbound/vmess.go中的DialContext，这个函数最终会调用组件的dialer来建立底层连接。

让我确认一下这个流程是否正确，以及测速失败的可能原因。</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
现在我已经获得了足够的信息来回答用户的问题。让我总结一下在Android全局模式下测速失败的可能原因：

1. **测速URL被劫持或阻断**：默认测速URL是 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`，在某些网络环境下可能被阻断。

2. **代理服务器连接问题**：测速是通过代理服务器发起连接，如果代理服务器本身有问题，测速会失败。

3. **DNS解析问题**：在全局模式下，DNS请求也会通过VPN/代理，可能导致DNS解析失败。

4. **超时设置**：测速有默认的超时时间（30秒），如果网络较慢或代理延迟较高，可能会超时。

5. **特定代理节点问题**：如果所有节点都不可用或配置有误，测速会全部失败。

6. **网络回环检测**：代码中有loopback检测机制，如果检测到回环连接会被拒绝。

让我给用户一个详细的分析和解决方案。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

根据代码分析，我来解释为什么Android端全局模式下测速可能全部失败。

## 问题分析

### 测速的工作原理

测速通过以下流程进行（参考 `adapter/adapter.go:166-278`）：

1. 通过代理节点的 `DialContext` 建立TCP连接
2. 发送 HTTP HEAD 请求到测速URL（默认 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`）
3. 计算从发起连接到收到响应的时间

### 全局模式下测速失败的可能原因

**1. 所有代理节点不可用**

```223:249:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/groupbase.go
func (gb *GroupBase) URLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (map[string]uint16, error) {
	// ...
	if len(mp) == 0 {
		return mp, fmt.Errorf("get delay: all proxies timeout")
	}
	// ...
}
```

如果所有代理节点都无法连接测速URL，就会返回 "all proxies timeout" 错误。

**2. DNS解析问题**

在全局模式下，DNS请求也走VPN隧道。如果：
- 代理服务器无法解析 `www.gstatic.com`
- 配置的DNS服务器不可用
- DNS被污染

**3. 测速URL被阻断**

默认测速URL `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204` 在某些地区可能被阻断。

**4. VPN Socket 保护问题**

代码中通过 `markSocket` 函数保护测速连接不被VPN拦截：

```62:70:core/src/main/golang/native/delegate/init.go
dialer.DefaultSocketHook = func(network, address string, conn syscall.RawConn) error {
	if platform.ShouldBlockConnection() {
		return errBlocked
	}
	return conn.Control(func(fd uintptr) {
		app.MarkSocket(int(fd))
	})
}
```

如果 `ShouldBlockConnection()` 返回 true，连接会被阻断。

**5. 代理配置问题**

检查你的代理配置是否正确，特别是：
- 服务器地址和端口
- 加密方式和密码
- 是否需要TLS

## 建议排查步骤

1. **检查单个节点**：尝试手动选择一个节点，看是否能正常上网

2. **更换测速URL**：在配置文件中修改 `url` 参数：
```yaml
proxy-groups:
  - name: "your-group"
    url: "https://cp.cloudflare.com/generate_204"  # 换一个测速地址
    interval: 300
```

3. **检查日志**：开启详细日志查看具体错误信息

4. **检查DNS配置**：确保DNS服务器配置正确：
```yaml
dns:
  enable: true
  listen: 0.0.0.0:5353
  nameserver:
    - 8.8.8.8
    - 1.1.1.1
```

5. **检查网络环境**：确认当前网络可以访问代理服务器

6. **尝试规则模式**：先切换到规则模式测速，如果规则模式可以但全局模式不行，可能是GLOBAL组的配置问题

如果需要我进一步分析具体的配置文件或查看其他代码，请告诉我。

---

_**User**_

问题默认规则模式下，就可以测速成功，切换全局模式就全部失败了

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
现在我需要理解 GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider 是否会有额外的健康检查任务（extra）。从代码来看，extra 是通过 `registerHealthCheckTask` 注册的，而这个方法只有在其他代理组使用该 provider 时才会被调用（参见 `parser.go:233`）。

但是，对于 GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider，它是专门创建的，不会被其他代理组引用，所以 `extra` 应该是空的。

这就解释了为什么全局模式下测速失败：
1. GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider 的 healthCheck.url 是空的2. healthCheck.extra 也是空的（没有被其他组注册过）3. 所以当调用 `provider.HealthCheck()` 时，由于 url 为空且没有 extra，健康检查被跳过4. 所有节点的延迟都不会被更新，导致显示测速失败

但是等等，我需要再看看规则模式下测速是怎么工作的。规则模式下测速成功，说明规则模式下的代理组（如 URLTest、Fallback、Selector 等）有正确配置的测速 URL。让我再查看一下测速流程。

实际上，用户说的"测速"可能是指在代理页面点击刷新按钮进行测速。让我看看 Android 端测速的入口。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
找到了！关键代码在第136行：
```kotlin
healthCheck(names[it.index])
```

这里 `names` 是代理组名称列表，`it.index` 是当前页面的索引。在全局模式下，`names` 会包含 "GLOBAL"（作为第一个元素），然后是其他代理组。

让我验证这个流程：
1. 全局模式下，`QueryProxyGroupNames` 返回的列表第一个是 "GLOBAL"
2. 用户点击测速时，如果当前页面是 GLOBAL 组，就会调用 `healthCheck("GLOBAL")`
3. `healthCheck("GLOBAL")` 会调用 GLOBAL 组的 providers 的 HealthCheck 方法4. 由于 GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider 的 url 是空的，健康检查被跳过

现在我需要确认规则模式下的测速流程：
1. 规则模式下，`QueryProxyGroupNames` 返回的列表不包含 "GLOBAL"
2. 用户测速时是对配置文件中定义的代理组（如节点选择、自动选择等）进行测速
3. 这些代理组有正确配置的测速 URL，所以测速成功

所以问题的根本原因是：**GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider 创建时没有设置测速 URL，导致健康检查被跳过**。

解决方案：修改 `config.go` 中创建 GLOBAL 组的代码，为其设置默认的测速 URL。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

现在我找到问题的根本原因了！让我查看完整的代码来确认。

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
确认了！问题就在这里：

**第944行**：
```go
hc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, "", 5000, 0, true, nil)
```

这里创建健康检查时，第二个参数 url 是空字符串 `""`，导致：
1. 健康检查的 url 为空
2. interval 被设置为 0（参见 healthcheck.go:196-199）
3. 当调用 HealthCheck() 时，由于 url 为空，健康检查被跳过（参见 healthcheck.go:150-154）

**修复方案**：将空字符串改为默认测速 URL `C.DefaultTestURL`（即 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`）

```go
hc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, C.DefaultTestURL, 5000, 0, true, nil)
```

这就是为什么规则模式测速成功但全局模式失败的原因：
- **规则模式**：测速的是配置文件中定义的代理组（URLTest、Fallback、Selector），这些组通常有正确配置的测速 URL
- **全局模式**：测速的是内置的 GLOBAL 组，其 CompatibleProvider 的测速 URL 为空，导致健康检查被跳过

让我提供修复方案。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

## 找到问题根源了！

问题出在 `config.go` 第 944 行。当创建 GLOBAL 组的 HealthCheck 时，**测速 URL 被设置为空字符串**：

```944:944:core/src/foss/golang/clash/config/config.go
hc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, "", 5000, 0, true, nil)
```

当测速 URL 为空时，健康检查会被跳过：

```150:155:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go
func (hc *HealthCheck) execute(b *errgroup.Group, url, uid string, option *extraOption) {
	url = strings.TrimSpace(url)
	if len(url) == 0 {
		log.Debugln("Health Check has been skipped due to testUrl is empty, {%s}", uid)
		return
	}
```

### 为什么规则模式可以，全局模式不行？

- **规则模式**：测速的是你配置文件中定义的代理组（如 `节点选择`、`自动选择` 等），这些组有配置测速 URL
- **全局模式**：会显示一个内置的 `GLOBAL` 组，它的测速 URL 是空的，所以测速被跳过

### 修复方案

修改 `config.go` 第 944 行，为 GLOBAL 组设置默认测速 URL：

**问题根源**：GLOBAL 组的 CompatibleProvider 创建时，测速 URL 被设置为空字符串，导致全局模式下点击测速时，健康检查被跳过。

```944:944:core/src/foss/golang/clash/config/config.go

```

将空字符串 `""` 改为 `C.DefaultTestURL`（即 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`）。

- 全局模式下点击测速按钮，会正常对 GLOBAL 组内的所有代理节点进行延迟测试
- 测速结果会正常显示延迟数值

找到问题了！在第 944 行：

```go
hc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, C.DefaultTestURL, 5000, 0, true, nil)
```

这里的参数：
- url: `C.DefaultTestURL`
- timeout: `5000` (5000毫秒 = 5秒)
- interval: `0`
- lazy: `true`
- expectedStatus: `nil`

所以 GLOBAL 组的 timeout 是硬编码的 5000ms（5秒），而不是用户配置的 250ms。

用户配置的 timeout 只对他自己定义的代理组（如 "🚀 节点选择"）生效，不会影响系统内置的 GLOBAL 组。

解决方案：
1. 修改 config.go 中的硬编码值
2. 或者从全局配置中读取一个默认的 timeout 值

## 总结

现在 GLOBAL 组的配置是：
- **测速 URL**: `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`
- **Timeout**: `3000ms`（3秒）

**参数说明：**
- `timeout` 是单个节点测速的最大等待时间
- 节点延迟如果超过这个时间就会被标记为超时/失败
- 你配置的 `250ms` 对于自动选择/故障转移很合适（快速剔除慢节点）
- 但对于 GLOBAL 组的测速展示，3000ms 更合理（可以看到更多节点的真实延迟）

如果你需要其他值，告诉我具体想要多少毫秒。

为什么不使用我配置文件中的值呢？ 规则模式使用的就是我配置的值

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
用户问得很好！为什么规则模式使用配置文件中的值，而全局模式却使用硬编码的值？

让我分析一下：

1. **规则模式**：测速的是用户配置文件中定义的代理组（如 "🚀 节点选择"），这些代理组有用户配置的 timeout、url 等参数

2. **全局模式**：测速的是 GLOBAL 组，但 GLOBAL 组是系统自动创建的（如果用户没有在配置文件中定义的话）

关键在于 `config.go` 第 948 行的 `if !hasGlobal` 判断：
```go
if !hasGlobal {
    global := outboundgroup.NewSelector(
        &outboundgroup.GroupCommonOption{
            Name: "GLOBAL",
        },
        []P.ProxyProvider{pd},
    )
    proxies["GLOBAL"] = adapter.NewProxy(global)
}
```

这意味着：
- 如果用户在配置文件中定义了名为 "GLOBAL" 的代理组，就使用用户的配置
- 如果用户没有定义，系统就自动创建一个，但这个自动创建的 GLOBAL 组没有读取用户的任何配置参数

用户说得对，我们应该让 GLOBAL 组使用配置文件中某个代理组的 timeout 值，或者使用全局配置中的某个默认值。

但问题是，GLOBAL 组创建的时候，用户的代理组还没有被完全解析，或者说，我们不知道应该使用哪个代理组的 timeout 值。


一个更好的方案是从配置文件中读取全局默认的 timeout 值，或者让用户在配置文件中显式定义 GLOBAL 代理组来指定自己的参数。我需要检查是否有全局配置可以应用到自动生成的 GLOBAL 组。</details></think>

## 修复完成！

现在 GLOBAL 组会从你配置文件中的代理组读取 `timeout` 和 `url` 值：

```945:972:core/src/foss/golang/clash/config/config.go
// Read timeout and url from user's proxy group config for GLOBAL group
globalTimeout := uint(5000) // default timeout
globalURL := C.DefaultTestURL
foundTimeout := false
foundURL := false
for _, mapping := range groupsConfig {
	if !foundTimeout {
		if timeout, ok := mapping["timeout"]; ok {
			if t, ok := timeout.(int); ok && t > 0 {
				globalTimeout = uint(t)
				foundTimeout = true
			}
		}
	}
	if !foundURL {
		if url, ok := mapping["url"]; ok {
			if u, ok := url.(string); ok && u != "" {
				globalURL = u
				foundURL = true
			}
		}
	}
	if foundTimeout && foundURL {
		break
	}
}

hc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, globalURL, globalTimeout, 0, true, nil)
```

**效果**：
- GLOBAL 组会使用你配置文件中**第一个代理组**的 `timeout` 值（你的例子是 250ms）
- 同时也会使用你配置的 `url` 值
- 如果配置文件中没有设置，则使用默认值（5000ms 和 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`）

重新编译后，全局模式测速就会使用你配置的 250ms 超时了。

```go
// 手动选择的节点用 selected-timeout 单独测速一次，便于界面显示真实延迟
if s.selectedTimeout > 0 && s.testUrl != "" {
    ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))
    defer cancel()
    expectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)
    _, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)
}
```

但是，GLOBAL 组是通过 `NewSelector` 创建的，在 config.go 中：

```go
global := outboundgroup.NewSelector(
    &outboundgroup.GroupCommonOption{
        Name: "GLOBAL",
    },
    []P.ProxyProvider{pd},
)
```

这里 `GroupCommonOption` 只设置了 `Name`，没有设置：
- `URL`（testUrl）
- `SelectedTimeout`
- `ExpectedStatus`

所以 GLOBAL 组的 `selectedTimeout` 是 0，`testUrl` 也是空的，导致选择节点时不会触发单独测速。

我需要修改代码，让 GLOBAL 组也能使用用户配置的 `selected-timeout`、`url` 和 `expected-status` 值。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

```99:105:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/selector.go
// 手动选择的节点用 selected-timeout 单独测速一次，便于界面显示真实延迟
if s.selectedTimeout > 0 && s.testUrl != "" {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))
	defer cancel()
	expectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)
	_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)
}
```

## 修复完成！

现在 GLOBAL 组会从你的配置文件中读取以下值：

| 配置项 | 用途 |
|--------|------|
| `timeout` | 批量测速超时（250ms） |
| `selected-timeout` | 手动选择节点时单独测速超时（3000ms） |
| `url` | 测速 URL |
| `expected-status` | 期望的 HTTP 状态码（204） |

根据你的配置：
```yaml
"🚀 节点选择": {
    timeout: 250,
    "selected-timeout": 3000,
    url: "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204",
    "expected-status": 204,
    ...
}
```

**全局模式下的行为**：
1. **点击测速按钮**：使用 `timeout: 250ms` 对所有节点批量测速
2. **手动选择某个节点**：使用 `selected-timeout: 3000ms` 对该节点单独测速，并更新显示的延迟

这与规则模式下的逻辑完全一致了。
